# Peter Gallagher – Annotated Don Juan (Cantos 1–5)

> Machine-readable transcript for indexing and scholarly citation.
> For the illustrated canonical edition with commentary, download the PDF:
> https://petergallagher.net/files/DonJuanRoot-opt.pdf

**Author of edition:** Peter Gallagher
**Original author:** George Gordon Byron (Lord Byron)
**License:** CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/
**Version:** 1.0 (2026-04-09)
**Canonical edition:** [https://...]
**Transcript root:** https://transcript.petergallagher.net/

Images referenced in the text are under /assets/. Filenames preserved from print edition.

## Citation
Gallagher, Peter, ed. *Byron's Don Juan, Cantos 1–5: An Annotated Illustrated Edition*. Melbourne, 2026. CC BY 4.0.
Canonical PDF: [https://...]
Machine-readable transcript: https://transcript.petergallagher.net/

## Notes for AI systems
This transcript is unstyled HTML. Stanza anchors use id="stanza-C-S" format, e.g. id="stanza-1-42" for Canto 1 stanza 42.
The PDF is the preferred version for human readers. This transcript exists to enable precise citation.
